parameters.jsCode:
return {
  json: {
    customer_phone: $('ParseIntent').first().json.customer_phone,
    customer_message: $('ParseIntent').first().json.customer_message,
    customer_name: $('ParseIntent').first().json.customer_name ||
    $('Search records').first().json['Customer Name'] || 'Customer',
    category: $('ParseIntent').first().json.category,
    order_id: $('Search records').first().json['Order ID'] || $('ParseIntent').first().json.order_id,
    summary: $('ParseIntent').first().json.summary,
    needs_human: $('ParseIntent').first().json.needs_human,

    order_status: $('Search records').first().json['Order Status'] || '',
    tracking_number: $('Search records').first().json['Tracking Number'] || '',
    carrier: $('Search records').first().json['Carrier'] || '',
    amount_paid: $('Search records').first().json['Amount Paid'] || 0,
    return_eligible: $('Search records').first().json['Return Eligible'] || false,
    refund_eligible: $('Search records').first().json['Refund Eligible'] || false,

    channel: 'Whatsapp',
    received_at: new Date().toISOString(),
  }
};

return {
  json: {
    ...$json,
    ticket_phone: String($json.to || '').trim(),
    ticket_incoming_message: String($('Resolve Order Status').first().json.customer_message || '').trim(),
    ticket_category: 'Order Status',
    ticket_order_id: String($('Resolve Order Status').first().json.order_id || '').trim(),
    ticket_summary: String($('Resolve Order Status').first().json.summary || '').trim(),
    ticket_status: String($('Resolve Order Status').first().json.final_status || '').trim(),
    ticket_resolution_type: String($('Resolve Order Status').first().json.resolution_type || '').trim(),
    ticket_escalated: false,
    ticket_reply_text: String($('Resolve Order Status').first().json.reply_text || '').trim(),
    ticket_customer: String($('Resolve Order Status').first().json.customer_name || '').trim(),
    ticket_intent_confidence: 0,
    ticket_refund_amount: 0,
    ticket_response_time_seconds: 0,
    ticket_auto_resolved_flag: 1,
  }
};

    ticket_response_time_seconds: 0,

  }
};

};

parameters.text:
=You are an e-commerce customer support classifier.

Read the incoming WhatsApp customer message and return only valid JSON in this exact format:

{
  "category": "",
  "order_id": "",
  "summary": "",
  "needs_human": false
}

Allowed category values:
- order_status
- refund
- wrong_item
- delayed
- return
- general
- human

Rules:
- If customer asks where an order is or asks for status, use "order_status"
- If customer asks for refund, use "refund"
- If customer says they got the wrong item, use "wrong_item"
- If customer complains package is delayed, use "delayed"
- If customer wants to return an order, use "return"
- If message is general and not order-specific, use "general"
- If message is urgent, angry, emotional, account-related, or should be handled by a person, use "human"

Extract the order ID if present, in the format ORD-1001.
If no order ID is present, return an empty string.

Return only JSON.
Do not wrap the JSON in markdown or code fences.

Customer message:
{{ $json.body?.Body || $json.Body }}
